blocks.text: Title Race on the Line: Arsenal Visit City at the Etihad

Arsenal lead Man City by six points — a win in Manchester could all but seal the title. Viktor Hovland enters the RBC Heritage final round just one stroke off the lead, chasing a statement win on American soil.
⛳ Hovland at -13, T2 — final round RBC Heritage, one shot behind Fitzpatrick
🏎️ Bahrain Grand Prix — championship leader Antonelli faces early pressure, round four begins
